screens.review: Splash is close to ready. Remaining work is visual verification and image asset validation.

screens.review: Onboarding is no longer blocked at architecture level. Remaining work is polish, validation and regression testing before marking READY.

screens.name: Home
screens.subtitle: Main player dashboard.
screens.review: Home is the key retention screen and should be reviewed next.

screens.name: Training
screens.subtitle: Training flow and drills.
screens.review: Training is the product value. Keep it simple before adding sensors.

screens.name: Results
screens.subtitle: Progress and results view.
screens.review: Results should show improvement without becoming an advanced analytics suite.

screens.name: Player

screens.review: Player supports the loop but is not the main MVP value.
